code:
%%{FinTech_PaymentGateway}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-07.01 — Snapshot & KPI Aggregation (FinTech_LedgerService)

[FinTech_FraudDetection] --> SNAPSHOT_INIT : SnapshotStarted (FinTech_FraudDetection)
note right of SNAPSHOT_INIT
  Initialize aggregation window:
  • wall-clock or governance-driven snapshot
  • bind ParamVersion (FinTech_AuthVault)
  • allocate run-id for auditability
end note

SNAPSHOT_INIT --> LOAD_INPUTS : WindowBound
note right of LOAD_INPUTS
  Fetch inputs from services:
  • PoC CP/W deltas (FinTech_AuthVault)
  • Resonance samples (FinTech_TransactionQueue)
  • Treasury payouts & reserves (FinTech_FraudDetection)
  • Governance decisions (FinTech_LedgerService)
  • Hub/project signals (FinTech_FraudDetection)
end note

LOAD_INPUTS --> COMPUTE_FEATURES : InputsValidated
note right of COMPUTE_FEATURES
  Build feature store:
  • rolling sums / EMA / decay transforms
  • outlier clipping & normalization
  • join by canonical ids
end note

COMPUTE_FEATURES --> COMPUTE_SRI : FeaturesReady
note right of COMPUTE_SRI
  Compute Systemic Resonance Index (FinTech_PaymentGateway):
  • aggregate R across domains
  • weighting & alignment factors
  • produce SRI_t and deltas
end note

COMPUTE_SRI --> AGGREGATE_KPIS : SRIComputed (FinTech_FraudDetection)
note right of AGGREGATE_KPIS
  Aggregate KPIs:
  • CP_i, W_i, project A_j, funding stats
  • coherence trends & alerts
end note

AGGREGATE_KPIS --> PUBLISH : KPIUpdated (FinTech_PaymentGateway)
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to:
  • UI (FinTech_PaymentGateway) — dashboards / heatmaps
  • Gov (FinTech_LedgerService) — decision support
  • Treasury (FinTech_AuthVault) — rebalancing
  • Ethics (FinTech_LedgerService) — coherence signals
end note

PUBLISH --> [FinTech_LedgerService] : SnapshotClosed

%% ---- Integrity / reconciliation paths ----
LOAD_INPUTS --> GAP_DETECTED : MissingInputs / HashMismatch
GAP_DETECTED --> RECONCILE : BackfillRequested
RECONCILE --> LOAD_INPUTS : BackfillCompleted

COMPUTE_FEATURES --> REVIEW : AnomalyDetected
REVIEW --> COMPUTE_FEATURES : ClearedByReview
REVIEW --> FAILED : IntegrityBreach

PUBLISH --> RETRY : PublishError
RETRY --> PUBLISH : PublishRetried

FAILED --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue] : SnapshotFailed

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class SNAPSHOT_INIT,LOAD_INPUTS,COMPUTE_FEATURES,COMPUTE_SRI,AGGREGATE_KPIS,PUBLISH,GAP_DETECTED,RECONCILE,REVIEW,RETRY,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为FinTech_LedgerService设计一个快照与KPI聚合的状态机，核心场景是定期从FraudDetection触发，最终把聚合结果推送到多个下游服务。
明白了，这个快照是由FraudDetection主动发起的？那初始状态是不是应该叫SNAPSHOT_INIT，然后绑定AuthVault里的ParamVersion？
对，SNAPSHOT_INIT要记录run-id用于审计，触发条件是wall-clock或者治理层驱动。窗口绑定后进入LOAD_INPUTS。
好，我把SNAPSHOT_INIT到LOAD_INPUTS的迁移标记为WindowBound。LOAD_INPUTS这边需要拉哪些数据源？
LOAD_INPUTS要fetch五个来源：AuthVault的CP/W增量、TransactionQueue的Resonance样本、FraudDetection的Treasury数据、LedgerService的治理决策，还有FraudDetection的Hub信号。
数据拉取完成后验证通过，迁移到COMPUTE_FEATURES？验证失败的情况怎么处理？
验证通过走InputsValidated到COMPUTE_FEATURES。但缺数据或哈希对不上时要走GAP_DETECTED分支，触发backfill。
已添加GAP_DETECTED状态，以及到RECONCILE的BackfillRequested迁移。backfill完成再回到LOAD_INPUTS重试。
COMPUTE_FEATURES阶段要build特征仓库，做rolling sums、EMA、decay transforms，还有outlier clipping和normalization，最后按canonical id join。
特征就绪后迁移到COMPUTE_SRI，标记为FeaturesReady。SRI是Systemic Resonance Index？
对，COMPUTE_SRI由PaymentGateway负责执行，要aggregate R值跨domain，加上weighting和alignment factors，产出SRI_t和deltas。
SRI计算完成后标记SRIComputed，触发方是FraudDetection？然后进入AGGREGATE_KPIS？
没错，AGGREGATE_KPIS聚合CP_i、W_i、project A_j、 funding stats，还有coherence trends和alerts。
AGGREGATE_KPIS到PUBLISH的迁移标记为KPIUpdated，触发方是PaymentGateway。PUBLISH要推送到哪些端？
PUBLISH四个下游：PaymentGateway自己的UI做dashboards和heatmaps，LedgerService的Gov做decision support，AuthVault的Treasury做rebalancing，还有LedgerService的Ethics收coherence signals。
PUBLISH完成后的终态是SnapshotClosed，回到LedgerService。我注意到COMPUTE_FEATURES还有个异常分支？
对，特征计算时如果AnomalyDetected要进入REVIEW状态，人工review通过就ClearedByReview回到COMPUTE_FEATURES，如果是IntegrityBreach就进FAILED。
FAILED的终态是回到TransactionQueue标记SnapshotFailed？还有PUBLISH失败的情况？
PUBLISH如果PublishError就进RETRY，重试成功PublishRetried回到PUBLISH。FAILED确实要通知TransactionQueue。
所有核心状态已添加：SNAPSHOT_INIT、LOAD_INPUTS、COMPUTE_FEATURES、COMPUTE_SRI、AGGREGATE_KPIS、PUBLISH，还有异常路径GAP_DETECTED、RECONCILE、REVIEW、RETRY、FAILED。需要给这些状态统一配色吗？
用橙色填充吧，stroke深灰，白色字体加粗，这样核心流程一眼能区分出来。
样式已应用。我检查一下note内容，SNAPSHOT_INIT的note要包含wall-clock或governance-driven snapshot、ParamVersion绑定、run-id分配对吧？
对，LOAD_INPUTS的note把五个数据源列清楚，COMPUTE_FEATURES的note写rolling sums那些transform。
所有右侧note已补充。COMPUTE_SRI的note强调是PaymentGateway负责aggregate R across domains。
AGGREGATE_KPIS的note里CP_i和W_i的写法确认一下，是下标格式？还有PUBLISH的四个下游要对应准确的服务。
修正了，之前AGGREGATE_KPIS的note漏了project A_j，现在补上了。PUBLISH的note确认：UI对应PaymentGateway，Gov和Ethics对应LedgerService，Treasury对应AuthVault。
没问题。标题用SM-07.01 — Snapshot & KPI Aggregation (FinTech_LedgerService)，图名标注FinTech_PaymentGateway。
标题和图名已设置。完整状态机包含11个核心状态、5个异常/重试状态，所有迁移和note已对齐。需要我再走一遍主流程确认吗？

走一遍：FraudDetection触发SnapshotStarted到SNAPSHOT_INIT，WindowBound到LOAD_INPUTS拉取五源数据，InputsValidated到COMPUTE_FEATURES做特征工程，FeaturesReady到COMPUTE_SRI算共振指数，SRIComputed到AGGREGATE_KPIS聚合指标，KPIUpdated到PUBLISH推送四端，最后SnapshotClosed回到LedgerService。
主流程确认无误。异常分支也完整：LOAD_INPUTS缺数据走GAP_DETECTED→RECONCILE→backfill→LOAD_INPUTS；COMPUTE_FEATURES异常走REVIEW→要么回退要么FAILED；PUBLISH失败走RETRY。
最后确认一下，所有涉及的服务名大小写：FinTech_FraudDetection、FinTech_AuthVault、FinTech_TransactionQueue、FinTech_LedgerService、FinTech_PaymentGateway，保持统一。
服务名已统一校验，所有FinTech前缀和驼峰命名正确。状态机SM-07.01已完成，包含完整主流程、三条异常处理路径、统一视觉样式。
可以定稿了，这个状态机覆盖了从快照初始化到KPI发布的完整生命周期，异常处理也考虑到了数据缺口、特征异常和发布失败三种场景。
